title: Banana Predict live: Polymarket terminal with wallet tracking, leaderboard and social tracker
summary: Banana Predict is a dedicated prediction-market terminal. It lets users find and copy-trade any wallet, browse a performance leaderboard to discover traders, and follow X accounts plus related news in one place. The interface is designed to replace fragmented tabs and outdated spreadsheet-style UIs.

title: Banana Predict 预测市场终端上线
summary: Banana Predict 是 Banana Gun 生态内自建的 Polymarket 终端，支持钱包追踪与复制交易、交易员排行榜、社交账号追踪等功能。用户可在同一界面内发现顶级交易员、查看其活动并直接复制仓位，无需在多个平台间切换。
